title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2024/0072  8 Druid Stoke Avenue, Bristol, BS9 1DD
body: "Type of application:  Full Planning Application  Applicant name:  Mr & Mrs D Ashby  Site address:  8 Druid Stoke Avenue, Bristol, BS9 1DD  Description of proposed development:  Proposed self-build dwelling and associated works.  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   Written Representations  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 17 January 2025   Date by when representations must be made 18 February 2025   Hearing date and venue N/A   Target Decision 14 March 2025   Decision date 13 March 2025     Decision   Decision Notice and Statement of Reasons  (PDF, 153 KB, 11 pages)   Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 18 February 2025.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, 3rd Floor, Temple Quay House, 2 The Square, Temple Quay, Bristol, BS1 6PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2024/0072 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     Application Form  (PDF, 5.41 MB, 14 pages)  CIL Form Self Build Exemption Completed  (PDF, 821 KB, 3 pages)  Form 1 CIL Additional information 8 Druid Stoke Avenue  (PDF, 391 KB, 6 pages)  Sheet-10 PROPOSED GREEN PRODUCTS  (PDF, 4.27 MB, 1 page)  Sheet-11 PROPOSED ELEVATIONS MEASURED  (PDF, 1.2 MB, 1 page)  Sheet-13 Proposed Bin Storage Plans and Elevations  (PDF, 1.34 MB, 1 page)  Sheet-1 OS Extracts  (PDF, 1.52 MB, 1 page)  Sheet-2 Survey  (PDF, 399 KB, 1 page)  Sheet-3 Proposed Basement and Ground Floor Plan  (PDF, 960 KB, 1 page)  Sheet-6 PROPOSED ELEVATION  (PDF, 1.13 MB, 1 page)  Sheet-7 PROPOSED GROUND AND FIRST FLOOR PLAN MEASURED  (PDF, 1.01 MB, 1 page)  Sheet-9 PROPOSED SITE PLAN  (PDF, 1.04 MB, 1 page)  Druid Stoke Avenue Planning Statement v5  (PDF, 10.1 MB, 24 pages)...
